summary: Mixed reactions: some listeners find the performance chaotic and disappointing, while others enjoy the vibe despite no specific recording details.
review: The two reviews offer contrasting views – one critic calls the band a disorderly bunch and rates it only three stars, while the other gives four stars with an enthusiastic "You shoulda been there!" Neither review mentions the source or sound quality, nor does it name any standout songs or individual player performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Based on a 3‑star and a 4‑star review with limited detail, the average suggests an average to slightly above‑average show; lack of recording info keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers commented on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; listeners simply express overall enjoyment or disappointment.
